raw_source.title: [Remote] zkLink is looking for Senior Rust Engineer 5~10KU
raw_source.body:
**Please check other open developer positions via the bottom official website.**
zkLink is a multi-chain trading infrastructure secured by revolutionary zero-knowledge technology. We’re on a mission to unify the world’s blockchains by building a multi-purpose ZK-Rollup middleware that is secure, efficient, and easy to use for Web3 developers and users.

## About
We are seeking an experienced and proficient Rust Engineer to join our team at zkLink. You will be responsible for developing and maintaining our web applications using the latest web technologies.
https://zk.link/

## Responsibilities

1. Develop and maintain backend systems using RUST and related tools.
2. Participate in the research, design, and development of zkrollup technology, implementing efficient Layer2 scaling solutions.
3. Optimize system performance and reliability, solve technical challenges and problems.
4. Participate in code reviews, unit testing, and system integration testing to ensure software quality and stability.
5. Stay updated with the latest RUST and blockchain technology developments, continuously learn and share relevant knowledge.

## Requirements
1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
2. Minimum of 3 years of experience in RUST development, familiarity with the RUST ecosystem and related toolchains.
3. In-depth understanding and passion for blockchain technology and the web3 ecosystem.
4. Familiarity with zkrollup technology or other Layer2 scaling solutions, with relevant project experience preferred.
5. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, able to learn and grasp new technologies quickly.
6. Excellent teamwork, communication, and coordination skills.
7. Proficiency in English and Chinese. (英语读写即可）

## Must to Haves
1. Practical experience with defi related projects.
2. Deep understanding of zk-Rollup and related technologies.

## Job Nature
- Full-time
- Remote


## Salary and Benefits
1. Competitive salary and benefits. (70-150K USD total package)
2. Flexible working hours and the possibility of remote work.
3. An innovative and rapidly evolving work environment.
4. An industry full of challenges and opportunities.

## Work Location
Remote, Beijing time

## Contact
HR telegram: @explorium2012
Official JDs: https://zklink.notion.site/Shape-the-multi-chain-future-at-zkLink-0426790c7c2f493487bec413c256a032

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

comments.body: @explorium2012 Hey ! I am a computer science student passionate about web3 tech,are there any open positions /internships for frontend/fullstack engineer?@202141521
comments.author: tanyas-codes
